The phrase 'when the pilot is not in control' translates to 'not standby', which maps to the LTL formula '!standby'. Combining these with the 'when' clause leads to the final formula 'state_is_STANDBY -> X state_is_TRANSITION' which asserts that if the autopilot is in STANDBY, then in the next state it will be in TRANSITION.
